title: vangueria infausta var. campanulata
intro: Vangueria infausta var. campanulata, also known as the Sweet Thorn or Monkey Fruit, is a plant species native to Africa and belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In traditional medicine, herbal preparations of Vangueria infausta var. campanulata are made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or using them as a decoction to treat various ailments.
